activities.instructions: Rewrite the complete sentence, correcting the affirmative form.
activities.prompt: This building use to be a post office.

evaluator.answer: This building used to be a post office

activities.explanation: La afirmativa pasada se escribe «used to».

activities.instructions: Rewrite the complete sentence, correcting the verb after «used to».
activities.prompt: I used to cycled to school.

evaluator.answer: I used to cycle to school

activities.explanation: Después de «used to» usamos el infinitivo «cycle».

activities.instructions: Rewrite the complete question, correcting the form after «did».
activities.prompt: Did you used to walk to school?

evaluator.answer: Did you use to walk to school

activities.explanation: Después de «did» usamos «use to», sin `-d`.

activities.instructions: Rewrite the complete sentence, correcting the form after «didn't».
activities.prompt: I didn't used to like olives.

evaluator.answer: I didn't use to like olives

activities.explanation: Después de «didn't» corresponde «use to».

activities.instructions: Rewrite the complete sentence, correcting the verb after «would».
activities.prompt: When we were children, we would played outside until dark.

evaluator.answer: When we were children, we would play outside until dark

activities.explanation: Después de «would» usamos el infinitivo «play».

activities.instructions: Rewrite the sentence with «used to» because it describes stable past possession.
activities.prompt: My uncle would have an old sailing boat in those days.

evaluator.answer: My uncle used to have an old sailing boat in those days

activities.explanation: La posesión estable usa «used to have», no el «would» habitual.

activities.instructions: Rewrite the complete sentence, correcting the verb after «would».
activities.prompt: Whenever we stayed with our grandparents, we would helped in the garden.

evaluator.answer: Whenever we stayed with our grandparents, we would help in the garden

activities.explanation: La forma correcta es «would help».

activities.instructions: Rewrite the complete sentence, correcting the affirmative form.
activities.prompt: I use to visit the market every Saturday, but I shop online now.

evaluator.answer: I used to visit the market every Saturday, but I shop online now

activities.explanation: La afirmativa de un hábito anterior usa «used to visit».

activities.instructions: Rewrite the complete sentence, correcting the affirmative past simple form.
activities.prompt: While I was abroad, I did called my parents every Sunday.

evaluator.answer: While I was abroad, I called my parents every Sunday

activities.explanation: La afirmativa normal usa directamente «called».

activities.instructions: Rewrite the sentence so it describes a former habit, not current familiarity.
activities.prompt: Before changing jobs, I was used to get up at five every morning.

evaluator.answer: Before changing jobs, I used to get up at five every morning

activities.explanation: La tarea pide el antiguo hábito: «used to get up».

activities.instructions: Rewrite the complete sentence, correcting the form after «be used to».
activities.prompt: I am used to get up before six now.

evaluator.answer: I am used to getting up before six now

activities.explanation: Después de «be used to» usamos la forma en `-ing`.

activities.instructions: Rewrite the complete sentence, correcting the form after «got used to».
activities.prompt: After a few weeks, I got used to travel by bus.

evaluator.answer: After a few weeks, I got used to travelling by bus

activities.explanation: «Get used to» va seguido de nombre o forma en `-ing`.

activities.instructions: Rewrite the complete sentence, correcting the verb after «would».
activities.prompt: Whenever we stayed with her, my grandmother would told us a story.

evaluator.answer: Whenever we stayed with her, my grandmother would tell us a story

activities.explanation: Después de «would» usamos «tell».

activities.instructions: Rewrite the sentence with «used to» because «know» describes a past state.
activities.prompt: My grandmother would know dozens of traditional songs in those days.

evaluator.answer: My grandmother used to know dozens of traditional songs in those days

activities.explanation: Un estado de conocimiento anterior usa «used to know».

activities.instructions: Rewrite the complete sentence, correcting the verb after «wouldn't».
activities.prompt: The old printer wouldn't started, however many times we pressed the button.

evaluator.answer: The old printer wouldn't start, however many times we pressed the button

activities.explanation: Después de «wouldn't» usamos el infinitivo «start».

activities.instructions: Rewrite the sentence as a current habit using present simple.
activities.prompt: I use to cycle to work now.

evaluator.answer: I usually cycle to work now

activities.explanation: `Used to` no tiene presente; usamos present simple con «usually».

activities.instructions: Rewrite the sentence with «used to» because it describes past existence.
activities.prompt: There would be a bookshop on this corner before the redevelopment.

evaluator.answer: There used to be a bookshop on this corner before the redevelopment

activities.explanation: La existencia estable anterior usa «There used to be».

activities.instructions: Rewrite the complete sentence, correcting the verb after «would».
activities.prompt: On cold mornings, the old engine would sounded rough for a minute.

evaluator.answer: On cold mornings, the old engine would sound rough for a minute

activities.explanation: La forma es «would + infinitivo»: «would sound».

activities.instructions: Rewrite the complete sentence, correcting the verb after «would».
activities.prompt: When I was a child, I would visited my aunt every Friday.

evaluator.answer: When I was a child, I would visit my aunt every Friday

activities.explanation: El marco está claro y la forma correcta es «would visit».

activities.instructions: Rewrite the complete question, correcting the form after «did».
activities.prompt: Did this area used to be quieter?

evaluator.answer: Did this area use to be quieter

activities.explanation: Después de «did» usamos «use to».

activities.instructions: Rewrite the complete sentence, correcting the negative form.
activities.prompt: I didn't used to be afraid of dogs when I was younger.

evaluator.answer: I didn't use to be afraid of dogs when I was younger

activities.explanation: Después de «didn't» usamos «use to be».

activities.instructions: Rewrite the complete sentence, correcting the verb after «used to».
activities.prompt: We used to walked along the harbour after dinner.

evaluator.answer: We used to walk along the harbour after dinner

activities.explanation: Después de «used to» usamos el infinitivo «walk».

activities.instructions: Rewrite the complete sentence, correcting both verbs after «would».
activities.prompt: On Sundays, Dad would cooked and we would washed up afterwards.

evaluator.answer: On Sundays, Dad would cook and we would wash up afterwards

activities.explanation: Ambas acciones usan «would + infinitivo».

activities.instructions: Rewrite the complete sentence, correcting the state and repeated-action forms.
activities.prompt: Lena used to knew everyone and would called at each door before the festival.

evaluator.answer: Lena used to know everyone and would call at each door before the festival

activities.explanation: Después de «used to» y «would» usamos infinitivos: «know» y «call».

activities.instructions: Rewrite the complete sentence, correcting the former habit and adaptation forms.
activities.prompt: I used to relied on paper maps, but I got used to use the navigation app.

evaluator.answer: I used to rely on paper maps, but I got used to using the navigation app

activities.explanation: Usamos «used to rely» y «got used to using».
